title: Baltimore declares extreme heat alert, extends pool hours amid forecasted triple-digit temperatures - Baltimore Fishbowl
state: Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu
search_term: ("heat advisory" OR "heat action plan" OR "heat alert" OR "IMD warning" OR "IMD alert" OR "red alert" OR "orange alert" OR "yellow alert" OR "NDMA advisory" OR "cooling shelter" OR "relief measures" OR "heat compensation" OR "severe weather warning") Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu
full_text:
The National Weather Service has also issued an Extreme Heat Warning.
Pools will be open from Wednesday, July 1, through Thursday, July 2:
Pools will be open from Friday, July 3, through Sunday, July 5:
